title: nepenthes mollis
intro: Nepenthes mollis, also known as the velvet pitcher plant, is a species of carnivorous plant that belongs to the Nepenthes genus. Native to the Philippines, this plant obtains essential nutrients by capturing and digesting small insects. The leaves of Nepenthes mollis contain sanguinarine, a medicinal compound with antimicrobial properties that has been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin irritations. Traditionally, the leaves of Nepenthes mollis are prepared as a herbal tea or infused in water to treat various ailments, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
